center.name: 德拉肯斯山脉
center.summary: 德拉肯斯山脉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括胡兀鷲、Forest buzzard、Yellow-breasted pipit等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This locally common but shy and unobtrusive siskin is found in the scrubby valleys and hillsides of the Drakensberg mountains

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The forest buzzard is endemic to South Africa, Lesotho and Eswatini where it occurs in an arc from the mountains of eastern Limpopo Province south through the Drakensberg of Kwazulu-Natal to the Western Cape. It as, at least, a partial migrant and seems to be a winter visitor (June–August) in the Drakensberg of Eastern Cape northwards where there are no breeding records

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2021 |title=Hemimacronyx chloris |volume=2021 |article-number=e.T22718444A180132223 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2021-3.RLTS.T22718444A180132223.en |access-date=20 December 2025}} | genus = Hemimacronyx | parent_authority = Roberts, 1922 | species = chloris | authority = (Lichtenstein, MHC, 1842) | synonyms = Anthus chloris (protonym) }} The yellow-breasted pipit (Hemimacronyx chloris) is a species of bird in the pipit and wagtail family Motacillidae that is found in the Drakensberg region of South Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: An isolated population inhabits the Drakensberg in South Africa.{{cite book |author1=Ferguson-Lees, J
